Tests the Math.atan2 function with specific input values to verify it returns -Math.PI / 2.

# Purpose
This code is a single assertion that tests the behavior of the `Math.atan2` function in JavaScript. It checks if the function returns the expected value of `-Math.PI / 2` when called with arguments `-Infinity` and `-1`. The purpose of this test is to verify that the `Math.atan2` function correctly handles edge cases involving negative infinity, ensuring compliance with the mathematical definition of the arctangent function. This code provides narrow functionality as it focuses on a specific test case for a mathematical function.
